package.name: mission_control
package.description:
mission_control_node — lifecycle orchestrator for the DV pipeline's autonomy stack. Receives SetMission from sim_supervisor (or, on the real car, from the physical uDV's microROS endpoint), drives mode_manager_node to bring up the autonomy lifecycle nodes with the correct mission strategy flag, and forwards control commands from control_node back to the supervisor (sim) or uDV (real car).
NOT to be confused with tools/mission_control/{frontend,backend} — that's the IFSSIM-side web stack. This package is the DV-pipeline ROS node that the web backend ultimately drives through the supervisor.
See docs/autonomy_pipeline.md §"Roles inside mission management".
